# Simple coverage demo - shows coverage collection from mcpdiff

# Compare two identical files
exec mcpdiff test1.mcp test2.mcp
stdout 'Files match exactly!'

# Compare different files
exec mcpdiff test1.mcp test3.mcp
stdout 'Files match exactly!'

-- test1.mcp --
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"ping","id":1}

-- test2.mcp --
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"ping","id":1}

-- test3.mcp --
mcp-send {"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"pong","id":1}
